required_preferences.fact: Extends evening stretching to 20 minutes as part of her prescribed wind-down routine, combined with deep breathing and progressive muscle relaxation—no meditation app during this period

supersedes.fact: Spends 10 minutes stretching each evening before meditation—never uses screens during this time

required_preferences.fact: Schedules weekly group training sessions for the mid-market sales team—now prioritizes structured team learning over individual coaching

supersedes.fact: Blocks time on her calendar for one-on-one coaching with new junior sales reps—never relies on impromptu training

required_preferences.fact: Reads contemporary fiction exclusively—never picks up nonfiction or self-help books
Checks work email only after walking her dog in the morning—never opens her inbox right after waking
Schedules weekly check-in calls with the retirement community’s assisted care staff, always ensures her brother is included via conference call when possible
Adjusts her Sunday coffee shop exploration tradition to include her parents, intentionally choosing locations they have not visited before

persona: A 28-year-old account executive at a fast-growing SaaS startup
